name: Rosy Grape Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cranberry juice cocktail, grape juice and pectin in a 3-quart saucepan until smooth.
2. Heat to boiling over high heat, stirring constantly.
3. Stir in sugar, all at once. Continue heating until boiling, stirring constantly.
4. Boil for 1 minute; remove from heat.
5. Skim off foam quickly.
6. Pour into hot sterilized jars immediately.
7. Let stand for 1 hour before covering with lids.
8. Refrigerate no longer than 3 weeks, or freeze no longer than 6 months. Thaw before serving.
